commit.message:
fix: Add 192.168.1.24 to docker-compose CORS config

The environment variable CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS in docker-compose.yml
was missing the network IP. Phone testing on 192.168.1.24:5173 was
getting CORS 403 on preflight requests.

Added:
- http://192.168.1.24:5173
- http://192.168.1.24:5174

Now phone OTP requests will work.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: 修复登录状态、WebSocket认证、商城、邀请码等多个问题

5. 商品价格使用salePrice字段,分页使用0-based索引
6. 所有分页列表页添加content字段支持(Spring Data Page格式)
7. 恢复缺失的wxLogin函数,统一登录状态管理

commit.message:
feat: Auto-detect user location on app load like mobile

MATCHING MOBILE APP BEHAVIOR:
✅ Detect user's device location using browser Geolocation API
✅ Reverse geocode to get address from coordinates
✅ Auto-save location or set as selected on first load
✅ Use free Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) for reverse geocoding
✅ Permission prompt when user opens app
✅ Silently fail if user denies permission

NEW METHODS:
- detectCurrentLocation() - Gets lat/lon from device
- Calls Nominatim API to convert coords to address
- Saves location and marks it as current

FLOW:
1. App loads
2. Browser asks for permission (if not granted before)
3. Get user's latitude/longitude
4. Convert to address using Nominatim
5. Save location or mark as selected
6. Show restaurants for that location

MOBILE PARITY:
- Mobile: Uses expo-location + reverse geocoding
- Web: Uses browser Geolocation + Nominatim API
- Both: Auto-detect and save on first load
- Both: Show available restaurants at location

NO API KEY NEEDED:
- Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) is free
- Rate limited but generous for apps

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Remove search/filter/sort, add map-based location selector

REMOVED:
❌ Search functionality from HomeScreen
❌ Category filtering from HomeScreen
❌ Sort options (by rating, delivery time)
❌ Complex filtering logic

NEW:
✅ LocationMapModal component with Leaflet map
✅ Interactive map for location selection
✅ Draggable markers to pin locations
✅ Toggle between manual address entry and map
✅ Map integration using react-leaflet
✅ OpenStreetMap tile layer for maps
✅ Two-step location creation: manual or map-based

MATCHING MOBILE:
- Mobile app has list + map tab switcher
- Web app now has manual + map options
- Both allow saving locations with coordinates
- Both store locations for future deliveries

LIBRARIES ADDED:
- leaflet@1.9.4
- react-leaflet@4.2.1

HOME SCREEN NOW:
- Shows all restaurants from /api/restaurants
- Simplified, no complex filters
- Just display restaurants, let users click to view menu

LOCATION SELECTOR:
- Two ways to add location: manual address or pick from map
- Map shows default Hyderabad coordinates
- Users can drag marker to select exact location
- Location label is customizable

* fix: regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml to fix broken merge conflict resolution

The merge commit 3c71a92 left pnpm-lock.yaml in a broken state — it
retained a reference to brace-expansion@1.1.13 (which depends on
balanced-match@1.0.2) but the balanced-match@1.0.2 package entry was

override for brace-expansion@^5.0.5 now correctly eliminates the 1.1.13
entry, leaving only the 5.0.5 resolution and its balanced-match@4.0.4
dependency.

Add React + Vite frontend for DnD Campaign Inventory Management System

- CharacterAccordion lazy-loads data on open and refreshes via item-added CustomEvent
- Typeahead search for adding items to characters
- Currency editor with coin-weight calculation (0.02 lb/coin)
- Plain CSS with CSS variables for light/dark themes; fully responsive
- All UI text in Spanish

Fix hover highlight using GeoJSON overlay instead of feature-state

Overture MVT feature IDs are 61-64 bit uint64 values that exceed
Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER (2^53-1), making setFeatureState unable to
match them. Switch to a GeoJSON source overlay approach: on hover,
copy hovered feature geometries into a separate GeoJSON source
rendered with brighter/thicker highlight layers on top.

Also add bathymetry to Base theme layers in README.
